mapper.select: select ci.id as cartItemId, ci.product_id as productId, ci.batch_id as batchId, ci.name, ci.image, ci.product_spec as productSpec, ci.number as quantity, ci.amount, case when ib.id is null or ib.status != 1 or ib.expiration_time < now() or p.status != 1 or c.status != 1 or c.type != 1 then 0 else greatest(ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity, 0) end as availableQuantity from cart_item ci left join product p on p.id = ci.product_id left join category c on c.id = p.category_id left join inventory_batch ib on ib.id = ci.batch_id where ci.user_id = #{userId} order by ci.create_time asc, ci.id asc

select ci.id as cartItemId, ci.product_id as productId, ci.batch_id as batchId, ci.name, ci.image, ci.product_spec as productSpec, ci.number as quantity, ci.amount, case when ib.id is null or ib.status != 1 or ib.expiration_time < current_timestamp() or p.status != 1 or c.status != 1 or c.type != 1 then 0 else case when (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) < 0 then 0 else (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) end end as availableQuantity from cart_item ci left join product p on p.id = ci.product_id left join category c on c.id = p.category_id left join inventory_batch ib on ib.id = ci.batch_id where ci.user_id = #{userId} order by ci.create_time asc, ci.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into orders( number, status, user_id, pickup_contact_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, phone, pickup_point, user_name, consignee, preparation_mode, fulfillment_fee, package_count, package_strategy, fulfillment_type, pickup_code, pickup_deadline ) values ( #{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{pickupContactId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{phone}, #{pickupPoint}, #{userName}, #{consignee}, #{preparationMode}, #{fulfillmentFee}, #{packageCount}, #{packageStrategy}, #{fulfillmentType}, #{pickupCode}, #{pickupDeadline} )

insert into order_detail( order_id, product_id, batch_id, name, image, product_spec, number, amount ) values
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.batchId}, #{item.name}, #{item.image}, #{item.productSpec}, #{item.number}, #{item.amount} )

insert into order_event_log( order_id, event_type, actor_type, actor_id, from_status, to_status, from_pay_status, to_pay_status, note, create_time ) values ( #{orderId}, #{eventType}, #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{fromPayStatus}, #{toPayStatus}, #{note}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: select od.order_id as orderId, od.product_id as productId, od.batch_id as batchId, od.name, od.image, od.product_spec as productSpec, od.number, od.amount from order_detail od where od.order_id = #{orderId} order by od.id asc

select id, order_id as orderId, event_type as eventType, actor_type as actorType, actor_id as actorId, from_status as fromStatus, to_status as toStatus, from_pay_status as fromPayStatus, to_pay_status as toPayStatus, note, create_time as createTime from order_event_log where order_id = #{orderId} order by create_time asc, id asc

select o.id, o.number, o.status, o.pay_status as payStatus, o.amount, o.remark, o.phone, o.pickup_point as pickupPoint, o.consignee, o.pickup_code as pickupCode, o.order_time as orderTime, o.checkout_time as checkoutTime, o.pickup_deadline as pickupDeadline, o.cancel_time as cancelTime, o.cancel_reason as cancelReason from orders o where o.id = #{id} and o.user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select o.id, o.number, o.status, o.user_id as userId, o.pay_status as payStatus, o.amount, o.order_time as orderTime from orders o where o.status = #{status} and o.pay_status = #{payStatus} and o.order_time <= #{deadline} order by o.order_time asc, o.id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update orders set status = #{status}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime} where id = #{id} and status in (1, 2)
update orders set status = #{status}, pay_status = #{payStatus}, checkout_time = #{checkoutTime} where id = #{id} and status = 1 and pay_status = 0
